title: The Absent Author
desc: A famous mystery writer vanishes before his book signing — but is it a real kidnapping? ✍️

title: The Bald Bandit
desc: A bank robber strikes — and a kid's video camera catches his bald head on tape. 🎃

title: The Canary Caper
desc: Pets vanish all over town — then the same houses get robbed. 🐦

title: The Deadly Dungeon
desc: Strange screams echo through a seaside castle — is it a ghost, or something else? 🏰

title: The Empty Envelope
desc: Five mysterious blue envelopes — and one hides a $50,000 stamp. ✉️

title: The Falcon's Feathers
desc: Baby falcons vanish from their nest — and a few feathers are left behind. 🪶

title: The Goose's Gold
desc: A sunken-treasure scam in Key West — and a boat named the Golden Goose. 🪙

title: The Haunted Hotel
desc: A ghost with a silver sword haunts the Shangri-la — but is it real? 👻

title: The Invisible Island
desc: A hundred-dollar bill on a sandy island leads to a hidden vault full of fake money. 🏝️

title: The Jaguar's Jewel
desc: A golden jaguar's emerald turns out to be a fake — and the kids must find the real thief in New York City. 🐆

title: The Kidnapped King
desc: A prince hiding in Green Lawn is snatched from his bed — and leaves a trail of yellow glass to name the culprit. 👑

title: The Lucky Lottery
desc: A $7-million winning lottery ticket vanishes from a Christmas card — and the kids must sniff out the crooked clerk. 🎟️

title: The Missing Mummy
desc: A child mummy vanishes at the museum — and the clues lead to buried treasure and a gold heist. 🏺

title: The Ninth Nugget
desc: A giant gold nugget vanishes from the ranch safe — and the kids must rope the real crook. ⛏️

title: The Orange Outlaw
desc: A priceless Monet vanishes during a NYC block party — and the thief leaves a trail of orange peels. 🦧

title: The Panda Puzzle
desc: A baby panda is snatched from Green Lawn's new Panda Park — and the ransom is one million dollars. 🐼

title: The Quicksand Question
desc: The town's duck bridge money vanishes — and the thieves may have sunk it in quicksand! 🏜️

title: The Runaway Racehorse
desc: A champion racehorse named Whirlaway vanishes the night before a big race — but who wanted him to lose? 🐎

title: The School Skeleton
desc: The school's skeleton, Mr. Bones, vanishes from the science room — and the three friends must find him. 💀

title: The Talking T. Rex
desc: A talking robot T. Rex hides a rare silver dollar — but someone wants that prize for themselves! 🦖

title: The Unwilling Umpire
desc: A charity baseball game — and six signed baseballs go missing. ⚾

title: The Vampire's Vacation
desc: A hotel guest says he's a vampire. Truth, or a trick? 🧛

title: The White Wolf
desc: A howling white wolf in the snowy woods. Real, or fake? 🐺

title: The X'ed-Out X-Ray
desc: A hospital x-ray is crossed out. Why hide the truth? 🩻

title: The Yellow Yacht
desc: A shiny yellow yacht, a missing person, a clue that floats away. ⛵

title: The Zombie Zone
desc: Strange footsteps in the fog... is the swamp haunted? 🧟
